memes.title: EXO 第13人 曾经的王 King
memes.analysis: 网友集体造梗虚构的 EXO 第 13 人, 中文'曾经的王' 国际'King'. 完整虚构设定: 云南农村出身/出道即巅峰/影响力堪比 MJ/公开恋情遭全网封杀/记忆篡改全网装信他存在过. 抽象+团魂+集体玩笑+假记忆, 二创空间大. 适合做'网络人物志 / 篡改记忆 / 都市传说 / 抽象 RP' 类内容.

prompts.Sora: A faux-documentary intro in style of a tabloid bio episode: dim lighting, vintage photograph montage of a fictional male K-pop star labeled 'King - the 13th member of EXO'. Slow zoom on a faded photo, dramatic voiceover narrates 'remember when 9 became 13'. Aged film grain texture, sepia tones, mock-archive footage style, 16:9 horizontal, 12 seconds.
prompts.Kling: 伪纪录片人物志开场: 昏暗灯光, 假冒K-pop明星老照片蒙太奇, 字幕'King - EXO第13人'. 慢推褪色老照片, 戏剧旁白'9 人变 13 人记得吗'. 复古胶片质感, 棕褐色调, 仿存档素材, 16:9, 12秒
prompts.Pika: Fake bio doc intro of fictional King 13th EXO member, vintage photo montage, sepia tones, dramatic narration, 16:9, 12s

memes.title: 上海二工大学生喊杀杀杀
memes.analysis: 上海第二工业大学一学生上课迟到睡觉, 被老师提醒后情绪失控砸讲台对老师怒吼'杀杀杀'. 校方称已介入安抚, 称学生有心理压力. 网友炸锅, 引发讨论 '校园不能只会安抚不会裁决' / 师生关系 / 心理健康. 上下文 + 戏剧反转 + 真实素材 + 社会议题, 抖音算法高度推. 二创空间巨大.

prompts.Sora: A dramatic Chinese classroom scene from a security camera angle: a young male student slumps at his desk asleep, the professor approaches, gently taps the desk. The student suddenly stands up, slams the desk with both palms, face distorted with rage, yells 'kill kill kill' three times. Other students freeze in shock. Dim fluorescent lighting, handheld POV style, 9:16 vertical, 8 seconds.
prompts.Kling: 中国大学教室监控视角戏剧场景: 年轻男生趴桌睡觉, 教授走近轻敲桌子, 学生突然起身用双手砸桌, 表情扭曲愤怒, 喊'杀杀杀'三声, 其他同学震惊定格. 昏暗荧光灯, 手持POV风, 9:16竖屏, 8秒
prompts.Pika: Chinese university classroom security cam, sleeping student awakens enraged, slams desk yelling 'kill kill kill' three times, students frozen, dim fluorescent, 9:16, 8s

memes.title: 战战战杀杀杀卡点舞
memes.date: 2023 至今爆 (2026-05 因二工大事件二次翻红)
memes.analysis: 卡点舞 BGM '战战战 杀杀杀' 节奏强烈, 适合双人尬舞 / 情侣互动 / 角色挑战. 单段 BGM 19-22 秒. 跟二工大事件叠加后再次翻红.

prompts.Sora: Two anime-style characters in school uniforms perform a synchronized punchy dance with sharp pose changes on each beat. Background flashes red on the 'kill kill kill' downbeat with motion-blur action lines. High contrast bright colors, energetic editing, 9:16 vertical, 15 seconds.
prompts.Kling: 两个校服动漫角色, 同步节奏感舞蹈, 每个重拍换姿势. 'kill'重拍背景闪红+动作线特效. 高对比明亮色彩, 节奏剪辑, 9:16, 15秒
prompts.Pika: Two anime school students dance synchronized, red flash on beat, kill kill kill, action lines, vibrant, 9:16, 15s

memes.title: 轻松绷住 / 大绷住
memes.heat: 单条 6万-3.4万 多账号都在做
memes.analysis: '绷住' 源自'蚌埠住了' (网络谐音, 意思: 被笑/被惊到忍不住). '轻松绷住' = 在该破防的尴尬场景里故作镇定. '大绷住' = 全员进入这个状态. 应用场景: 严肃会议突然笑场 / 老师讲冷笑话 / 客户嫌弃但你要保持微笑. 反差喜剧, 万能模板.

prompts.Sora: Office meeting scene: a young professional struggles to keep a straight face while a colleague says something absurd. Camera zooms in slowly on twitching lips fighting back a smile. Text overlay '试图轻松绷住' appears. Bright office lighting, 9:16 vertical, 6 seconds.
prompts.Kling: 办公室会议场景: 年轻职员强忍不笑当同事说荒谬的话. 镜头缓慢推近抖动的嘴角. 屏幕字幕'试图轻松绷住'. 明亮办公室, 9:16, 6秒
prompts.Pika: Office worker tries not to laugh during meeting, slow zoom on lips, subtitle 试图轻松绷住, bright office, 9:16, 6s

memes.title: 班上的 6G 网速姐
memes.analysis: 校园场景: 班里同学对老师提问的'网速' (反应速度) 各不同, 网速姐是 6G (秒回), 旁边人是 5G/3G/2G 慢半拍/没听见. 用'手机信号格' 类比反应速度, 视觉反差强. 由@静皇a (网速姐) 引爆, 已成校园场景万能套路.

prompts.Sora: A vibrant high school classroom split into four sub-frames showing the same teacher's question reaching four students at different speeds. Student 1 instant answer (6G icon), Student 2 mild delay (5G), Student 3 confused (3G), Student 4 fully zoned out (no signal). Anime-style overlay signal bars above each head, comedic timing, 9:16 vertical, 8 seconds.
prompts.Kling: 高中教室分四格: 同一老师提问到四个学生反应不同速度. 1立刻答(6G信号图标), 2轻微延迟(5G), 3困惑(3G), 4完全走神(无信号). 动漫风信号格特效悬头顶, 喜剧节奏, 9:16, 8秒
prompts.Pika: Classroom split-four-frame, same question reaches students at different speeds, signal bar icons above heads 6G/5G/3G/no signal, anime overlay, comedic, 9:16, 8s

memes.title: 从夯到拉
memes.analysis: '夯' = 棒/猛/精彩 (老梗复活), '拉' = 拉胯/差. 整个表达式 '从夯到拉' / '夯爆了' / '拉完了' 形容某事/某人从精彩开始最后变差的过山车体验. 应用: 评价剧/游戏/产品/餐厅, 表达落差.

prompts.Sora: Split-screen progression of a roller coaster experience: left frame a vibrant exciting moment labeled '夯', right frame the same scene faded sad and dimmed labeled '拉', transitioning slowly from left to right with mood-matched lighting. 9:16 vertical, 8 seconds.
prompts.Kling: 过山车体验分屏: 左 '夯' 鲜艳激动场景, 右 '拉' 同场景褪色暗淡, 慢速左到右过渡+对应灯光. 9:16, 8秒
prompts.Pika: Split-screen 夯 vibrant exciting vs 拉 faded sad, slow transition, mood lighting, 9:16, 8s

memes.title: 中奖概率倍儿高
memes.analysis: 抽象梗, 反话: 任何坏运气/翻车/被坑都说'中奖概率倍儿高' 自嘲. 京味口音, 把霉运说成中奖. 应用场景: 排队总轮到自己被检查 / 等车一定迟到 / 选了最难走的路.

prompts.Sora: A man in casual clothes stands at a bus stop in the rain looking up at the sky with deadpan resignation as buses pass without stopping. Subtitle overlay '中奖概率倍儿高' appears in playful font. Grey rainy palette, slight comedic timing, 9:16 vertical, 5 seconds.
prompts.Kling: 雨中公交站男生穿便服无奈仰望天空, 公交一辆辆开过不停. 屏幕字幕'中奖概率倍儿高' 俏皮字体. 灰色雨天调, 喜剧节奏, 9:16, 5秒
prompts.Pika: Man at bus stop in rain, buses pass without stopping, deadpan, subtitle 中奖概率倍儿高, grey rainy, 9:16, 5s

memes.title: 何必心存侥幸何必太羞耻
memes.analysis: 类似某流行歌词/台词的衍生梗 (具体出处待确认). 用法是当作'人生格言'式语调发出, 配抓拍的尴尬时刻, 反讽自我安慰. 应用场景: 偷吃东西被抓 / 装睡被识破 / 借口被戳穿.

prompts.Sora: A young woman caught eating from the fridge late at night, freezes for a second, then sighs philosophically and continues eating. Subtitle overlay '何必心存侥幸何必太羞耻'. Warm kitchen lighting, slight slow-motion, 9:16 vertical, 6 seconds.
prompts.Kling: 深夜年轻女生从冰箱偷食被发现, 定格1秒然后哲学地叹气继续吃. 屏幕字幕'何必心存侥幸何必太羞耻'. 暖色厨房灯, 轻微慢镜, 9:16, 6秒
prompts.Pika: Woman caught eating from fridge at night, freezes then sighs philosophically continues, subtitle 何必心存侥幸何必太羞耻, warm kitchen, 9:16, 6s

memes.title: 杀杀第一视角课堂
memes.source: 抖音二创 (二工大梗衍生)
memes.analysis: 用二工大事件梗做'第一视角'视频: 镜头主观视角进入教室 → 老师走来 → 学生主观视角砸桌喊杀. 转视角 + 反转, 模仿成本低. 可结合各种场景 (办公室/食堂/相亲) 做职场或日常二创.

prompts.Sora: First-person POV shot inside a Chinese classroom: hands resting on desk, fingers twitching with anger, the teacher's silhouette approaches from blurred background. Sudden POV shake as hands slam down, vision red-tints, shouting 'kill kill kill' in synced audio. 9:16 vertical, 6 seconds.
prompts.Kling: 中式教室第一视角: 手放桌上手指颤抖, 老师模糊轮廓从背景走近. 突然视角晃动手砸桌, 视野泛红, 同步喊'杀杀杀'. 9:16, 6秒
prompts.Pika: POV Chinese classroom, angry hands trembling, teacher silhouette approaches, slam desk POV shake red tint, kill kill kill, 9:16, 6s

memes.title: 杀神哥 (粤语版)
memes.analysis: 把'杀杀杀'魔性内容用粤语/方言/外语翻唱重做. 跨语言反差产生笑点, 适合各种方言达人/语言学博主二创.

prompts.Sora: A cartoonish bilingual narrator in casual clothes overlays Cantonese dubbed audio over the classic Chinese 'kill kill kill' clip. Split-screen comparison: original on left, Cantonese version on right with subtitles. Vibrant studio background, 9:16, 12 seconds.
prompts.Kling: 卡通双语博主, 用粤语翻唱'杀杀杀'原版片段, 左右分屏: 左原版/右粤语字幕版. 鲜艳工作室背景, 9:16, 12秒
prompts.Pika: Bilingual narrator dubs kill clip in Cantonese, split-screen compare, vibrant studio, subtitles, 9:16, 12s

memes.title: 不如喘口气吧小大人 / 真心很贵
memes.analysis: 抽象温柔梗, 歌词式句段: '不如喘口气吧小大人. 真心很贵. 不要什么都往心里去. 没心没肺才能活的不累. 真心很贵你别逢人就给. 感情很重你别轻易卑微.' 萌系 emoji 大量配合, 用在自嘲精神内耗/情感建议/打工人话题, 治愈+无奈+劝慰三合一. 蛋仔派对+脸式舞+游戏角色 (高松灯/芮娜) 都在用.

prompts.Sora: A cute illustrated character (mascot style) sits on a tiny chair sighing softly with text-message bubbles floating up: 'rest a bit, little adult', 'sincerity is expensive', 'don't give your heart away too easily'. Soft pastel pink and lavender palette, gentle lo-fi mood, 9:16 vertical, 10 seconds.
prompts.Kling: 可爱吉祥物角色坐小椅子轻叹气, 文字气泡漂浮: '不如喘口气吧小大人' '真心很贵' '别逢人就给'. 粉紫柔和色调, lo-fi 治愈氛围, 9:16, 10秒
prompts.Pika: Mascot sighs gently, text bubbles float, pastel pink lavender, lo-fi healing mood, vertical 9:16, 10s

memes.title: 跳跃不是罪过
memes.source: 抖音 (三角洲行动 BGM 二创)
memes.analysis: 三角洲行动玩家 jump-shot 老梗复用: '跳跃不是罪过, 跳是为了活'. 适合任何打游戏被人嘲笑'你怎么老跳' 反讽 / 职场被批 '你怎么老闪躲' 反讽. 旋律抓耳, 是个 BGM-style 梗.

prompts.Sora: A gamer character mid-air in a jumping motion against a tactical FPS background, dust particles, frozen action shot. Text overlay '跳跃不是罪过 跳是为了活'. Bold game-trailer style, dramatic lighting, 9:16 vertical, 6 seconds.
prompts.Kling: FPS 玩家角色空中跳跃定格, 战术背景+尘土粒子. 字幕'跳跃不是罪过 跳是为了活'. 游戏宣传片风格, 戏剧灯光, 9:16, 6秒
prompts.Pika: Gamer mid-jump tactical FPS bg, action freeze, dust particles, subtitle 跳跃不是罪过 跳是为了活, game trailer, 9:16, 6s

memes.title: 评论区审美积累
memes.analysis: 抖音评论区中网友互相 '审美积累' 的截图合集. 当某条视频出现真知灼见的高赞评论时, 网友说'又是评论区审美积累的一天'. 适合任何视频末尾切到评论区 + 高亮高赞评论的格式. 反思/感悟/共鸣类内容标配.

prompts.Sora: A vertical phone screen mockup showing a TikTok-style comment section scrolling up, the top comment is highlighted with golden glow, text overlay '评论区审美积累'. Modern UI design, smooth scroll animation, 9:16 vertical, 8 seconds.
prompts.Kling: 竖屏手机界面: 抖音风格评论区上滚, 顶部高赞评论金色发光高亮, 字幕'评论区审美积累'. 现代 UI, 平滑滚动, 9:16, 8秒
prompts.Pika: Vertical phone mockup TikTok comment section scrolling, top comment golden glow, subtitle 评论区审美积累, modern UI, 9:16, 8s
